import io
import list
import string

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut started = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut num = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_digit
      started = true
      num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
      i = i + 1
    else if (b == 45 or b == 43) and not started
      started = true
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      end
      i = i + 1
    else if is_ws
      if started
        result = list.push(result, sign * num)
        started = false
        sign = 1
        num = 0
      end
      i = i + 1
    else
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if started
    result = list.push(result, sign * num)
  end
  result
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut found_i = -1
mut found_j = -1
let len = list.len(nums)
mut i = 0
while i < len and found_i < 0
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < len and found_i < 0
    let a = get_or_zero(nums, i)
    let b = get_or_zero(nums, j)
    if a + b == t
      found_i = i
      found_j = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found_i < 0
  println("none")
else
  println("found=#{found_i},#{found_j}")
end
